fields.name: Version Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version code of the production BOM.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the production BOM version.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date for this production BOM version.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the manufacturing batch unit of measure.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the production BOM version card was last modified.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the production BOM version.
